name: Stranger Things RPG
description:
"When a young boy vanishes, a small town uncovers a mystery involving secret experiments, terrifying supernatural forces, and one strange little girl". Set in 1980s Indiana, the series follows friends, family, and local police searching for answers, unraveling conspiracies, and facing a parallel dimension known as the "Upside Down"

Based on a RP i was doing a while ago, i decided create it but with my own tags and a free for all part, i'm sure people will enjoy this version, why you ask? Just trust me on this one.

PS: this bot covers all seasons together not only 5.
creator: Fabricio Gabriel
